sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115567" key="yeudosofisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδοσοφ-ιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115567.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sham-sophist,</tr_> name of a treatise by Lucian.</sense> </entryFree>
